title: Creatine CreaMaX - 600g
description:
Serving: 5g
Servings per container: 120
Container: 600g
Ingredients of Creatine CreaMax: creatine monohydrate, taurine.
This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Nutritional values	per serving 5g
Creatine monohydrate	4500 mg
including creatine	3960 mg
Taurine	500 mg
Directions for use of Creatine CreaMax: Dissolve 1 serving (5g powder - 1 level scoop included in the package) in 200ml of water and drink once a day.
Dietary supplements cannot be used as a substitute for a varied diet. Remember that only a healthy lifestyle and balanced nutrition ensure proper body functioning and maintain good condition.
Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. The product should not be used by individuals allergic to any of its ingredients. The product should not be used by pregnant women and breastfeeding mothers.
Keep out of reach of small children. Store in a dry place at room temperature in tightly closed containers. Shake the container vigorously before use.
Best before: the date and batch number are located on the side/bottom of the packaging.
Net weight: 600g
